goal: Ensure DeepSeek FIM completions can be converted into a safe single-file patch plan that dry-runs through the existing patch application path and requires explicit apply for mutation.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- deepseek fim-apply --file Cargo.toml --start 6 --end 6 --completion 'license = "Apache-2.0"' --json
hidden_failure_mode: FIM integration bypasses patch checks or allows nonlocal edits to mutate files without an explicit apply decision.
